title: Principal Frontend Developer at ISRO Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at ISRO Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
